title: Integration tests self-skip when data/kaggle is absent
evidence: internal/soccer/integration_test.go:15 t.Skipf("data directory not available") — a conditional guard in dataDir(); the bundled data/kaggle/ is present in this archive so the 4 integration tests actually run
suggestion: Acceptable defensive guard; no action needed. Flagged for cross-run skip accounting.

title: Cross-dataset fixture deduplication beyond spec
evidence: internal/soccer/store.go:73 dedupeMatches() collapses the same fixture appearing across the 3+ overlapping datasets (±1 day tolerance), preventing tripled points in standings
suggestion: None — this is a correctness improvement the spec did not explicitly require but which makes standings accurate (2019 Brasileirão → Flamengo 90 pts matches the spec example).

title: data_overview tool and team-name canonicalization beyond spec
evidence: internal/mcp/tools.go:144 data_overview reports load counts/warnings; internal/soccer/normalize.go canonicalizes aliases (Athletico/Atletico Paranaense, Vasco variants) while keeping the three Atlético clubs (MG/PR/GO) distinct
suggestion: None — directly addresses the spec's 'Team Name Variations' data-quality note.
